prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第73名，近年排名在60–7 3名之间波动，整体处于中上水平；声誉文件中无该校明显负面或正面舆情记录，声誉平稳中性；抖音热度未进入全国前100名，曝光度一般；未见投档断档历史 记录；石油与天然气工程、地质资源与地质工程、化学工程与技术等为传统优势学科，与招生专业中的石油工程、油气储运工程、化工与制药类等高度对应，对 相关专业报考有稳定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程等热门专业社会热度较高，而石油、化工、地质等传统工科热度一般；本省2026年物理类考生167419人， 较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，竞争压力有所缓解；该校位于山东青岛，属东部沿海城市，对山西考生有一定地域吸引力；山西省内无同类石油类高校，跨省报 考意愿稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年因专业组划分导致的位次跳升、2026年招生计划小幅扩招、本省物理类考生减少等因素，预计2026年位次在2025年22830名基础上略有 后移但幅度有限；预测最低位次约22984名，区间22484–23484名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 12264, 13611, 11013, 12874, and 22830 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated within the 11000–13600 range. In 2025, due to the college entrance examination reform dividing into two major groups, the ranking for the group with no further subject restrictions significantly dropped to 22830, forming a clear jump. The university's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province for Science/Physics Category was 116 in 2021, 113 in 2022, 116 in 2023, 110 in 2024, and 116 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 119, a slight expansion of about 2.6% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 73rd, with rankings fluctuating between 60 and 73 in recent years, overall at an upper-middle level. There are no significant negative or positive public opinion records in the reputation file, maintaining a neutral and stable reputation. Its Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 100, with average exposure. No historical records of enrollment gaps. Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, etc., are traditional advantageous disciplines, highly corresponding to majors such as Petroleum Engineering, Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering, and Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering, providing stable support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering have high social popularity, while traditional engineering majors like Petroleum, Chemical, and Geology have average popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in this province is 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, easing competition pressure. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, an eastern coastal city, which has some regional appeal to Shanxi candidates. There are no similar petroleum universities within Shanxi Province, so cross-province application willingness is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the ranking jump caused by the major group division in 2025, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, and the decrease in Physics Category candidates in this province, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly shift back from the 2025 ranking of 22830 but with limited magnitude. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 22984, with a range of 22484–23484.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 22484–23484, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Electronics) as a sprint option, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 22000), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, you should prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Petroleum Engineering and Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering, which are the university's flagship programs, while also considering Tier 3 majors for a stable admission.
